choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY contractCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

choose.when: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_name USING utf8mb4) AS demand_agency_name, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}
choose.otherwise: SELECT demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE demand_agency_name IS NOT NULL AND demand_agency_name <> '' AND first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY demand_agency_name ORDER BY avgAmount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{topN}

mapper.select:
SELECT bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, contract_method AS contractMethod, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE 1=1
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstContractDate}
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
ORDER BY first_contract_date DESC, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, contract_method AS contractMethod, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_summary USE INDEX (idx_pcs_order) WHERE 1=1
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstContractDate}
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
ORDER BY first_contract_date DESC, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no

SELECT bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency_name AS demandAgencyName, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, detail_item_name AS detailItemName, contract_method AS contractMethod, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount AS finalContractAmount, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE 1=1
AND (first_contract_date, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no) < (#{lastFirstContractDate}, #{lastBidNoticeNo}, #{lastVendorBizRegNo})
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstContractDate}
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
ORDER BY first_contract_date DESC, bid_notice_no, vendor_biz_reg_no LIMIT #{length}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE 1=1
AND demand_agency_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyName}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND detail_item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailItemName}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND first_contract_date = #{firstContractDate}
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND first_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND first_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'

choose.when: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) AS region, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) ORDER BY salesAmount DESC

SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) AS region, SUM(amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, SUM(amount) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_region USING utf8mb4) AS region, IFNULL(final_contract_amount, 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(demand_agency_region USING utf8mb4) AS region, IFNULL(total_supply_amount, 0) AS amount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE first_ref_date >= #{from} AND first_ref_date <= #{to} ) combined GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) ORDER BY salesAmount DESC

SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) AS region, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) ORDER BY salesAmount DESC

SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) AS region, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avgAmount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND initial_contract_date >= #{from} AND initial_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) ORDER BY salesAmount DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) AS region, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount), 0) / COUNT(*) AS avgAmount FROM procurement_contract_summary WHERE first_contract_date >= #{from} AND first_contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(demand_agency_region), ''), '(미지정)'), ' ', 1) ORDER BY salesAmount DESC

mapper.select: SELECT is_excellent_product AS excellentFlag, IFNULL(SUM(contract_amount), 0) AS amount FROM procurement_contract_flat WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND contract_date >= #{from} AND contract_date <= #{to} GROUP BY is_excellent_product

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_supply_amount), 0) AS salesAmount, IFNULL(SUM(delivery_count), 0) AS contractCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_excellent_product = 'Y' THEN total_supply_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS excellentAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_excellent_product != 'Y' OR is_excellent_product IS NULL THEN total_supply_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS generalAmount FROM shopping_mall_summary WHERE final_ref_date >= #{from} AND final_ref_date <= #{to}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount FROM service_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(final_contract_amount_sum), 0) AS salesAmount, COUNT(*) AS contractCount FROM construction_contract_grouped WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND final_contract_date >= #{from} AND final_contract_date <= #{to}
